TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Hungary, title = Hungary, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hungary} }

S.FORM: u Hungary sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 47 00 N, 20 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 93,028 km2 u ahebal nu lalaay sa 89,608 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 3,420 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 9,874,784. kakalukan umah sa 58.90%, kilakilangan umah sa 22.50%, zumaay henay umah sa 18.60% caay kamu cabaya a kanatla nu Taywan. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Budapest . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 20 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci J√°nos √Āder, micakat a demiad sa i 2012 a mihca 5 bulad 10 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Hungary ayza sa ci Viktor Orb√°n, micakat a demiad sa i 2010 a mihcaan 5 bulad 29 demiad. Hungary Hungary Hungary a kamu "Magyarorsza'g" han u i Cung-ow Pannonia masaenal ku lalabu nu kanatal, 93030 kungli kaahebal, nuwaminsa a belaw u Slovakia, nuwalia amis a belaw u Ukraine, nuwalian atu nuwalian timul balaw u Romania, nutimulan a belaw u Serbia, satipan timul belaw Croatia, satipan belaw Slovenia, satipan nuwamisan a belaw u Austria. kanatal a kamu Magyarok han, nu Ouzhou ku kamu. caay ku nu Yindu Ouzhou a kamu. u Oumeng tatudungay a ahebal nu kanatal. kahenunal a tu-se atu satabakiay a tu-se u Budapest, nu zumaay a tabakiay tu-se zuma satu u Debrecen, Szeged, Miskolc, Bei-chi, Jiaoer. ayzaay a Hungary a kanatal i ayaw tu malebut a mihcaan namakuwan nu pinaay a binacadan, pasu Dacia a tademaw, Celtic (Kai-er-te a tademaw ŚáĪÁąĺÁČĻšļļ), Roman (Romae ÁĺÖť¶¨) a tademaw, Germanic (Rierman a tademaw śó•ŤÄ≥śõľšļļ), Hungary a tademaw , nutipan a slavs a tademaw , atu Avaria a tademawan . kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan , Magyar a tademaw ci Alpad (Aer-pa-de ťėŅÁąĺŚłēŚĺ∑) a tapang ku mikeliday mademec ku Karpat-medence, u baki a wawaan niza ci Isn-te'-wan cacay a lasubua a mihcaan i cacay a malebut a mihcaan malahungti, patizeng satu tu ciwlu a kiwkay. kasumamadan tu 12 a mihcaan, Hungary mala Ouzhou a kakitizaan u saicelangay a misakakuay. kasumamadan tu15 a mihcaan, u lalangawan atu cen-ce katukuh tu i satalakaway. 1526 a mihcaan u saayaway nu Mohachi (Mo-ha-chi śĎ©ŚďąŤĶ§) a ngangayaw hawsa Hungary makelec nu Ottoman (E-tu-man ťĄāŚúĖśõľ) "1541-1699 a mihcaan". kasumamadan tu18 a mihcaan malingatu makuwan nu Habsburg Monarchy. 19 a mihcaan atu Austria masakapu tu Austria Hungary a kanatal, mala u saicelangay mikuwan nu Europe. saayaway a ngangayaw nu kitakit hawsa, Austro-Hungarian (Ao-Hungary Ś•ßŚĆą) a kanatal maliwasak tu, namasasulit tu Trianon (Te-li-ya-nung ÁČĻťáĆšļěŤĺ≤) a katatelekan hawsa Hungary malasawad tu ku payhun 71% a lala' atu payhun 58% ku tademaw, atu payhun 32% ku tademaw nu Mazar. zikuzan tu kalawlawan a mihcaan, Hungary micumud tu nitungusay i balucu'ay u kanatal milihiza tu sakatusa a ngangayaw nu kitakit, satu pihaceng ku madukaay mapatayay. zikuzan nu sakatusa a ngangayaw, Hungary mala nu Sulian a uysin a kanatal katukuh i 1989 a mihcaan. i 1956 a mihcaan u Hungary mikawaw tu misapakutay caay kalaheci hawsa, Hungary pasumad tu Goulash (Ku-las-sen ŚŹ§śčČšĽÄ) kung-can a nizatengan. 1989 a mihcaan atu Austria masasu patahkal tu lilis nu kanatal kalamkam satu maliwasak ku nuwalianay a sakaput atu Sulian. 1989 amihcaan caca a bataan tusa bataan izaw ku tulu a demiad, Hungaty amala u I'-huy-min-cu a kanatal. . saayaway a ngangayaw nu kitakit hawsa, Austro-Hungarian (Ao-Hungary Ś•ßŚĆą) a kanatal maliwasak tu, namasasulit tu Trianon (Te-li-ya-nung ÁČĻťáĆšļěŤĺ≤) a katatelekan hawsa Hungary malasawad tu ku payhun 71% a lala' atu payhun 58% ku tademaw, atu payhun32% ku tademaw nu Mazar. zikuzan tu kalawlawan a mihcaan, Hungary micumud tu nisakapu milihiza tu sakatusa nu kitakit a ngangangan, satu pihaceng ku madukaay mapatayay. zikuzan nu sakatusa a ngangayaw, Hungary mala nu Sulian a uysin a kanatal katukuh i 1989 a mihcaan. i 1956 a mihcaan u Hungary ke-min mademec hawsa, Hungary pasumad tu nu Ku-las-sen kung-can a nisabalucu'an. 1989 a mihcaan atu Austria masasu patahkal tu lilis nu kanatal kalamkam satu maliwasak ku nuwalianay a sakaput atu Sulian. 1989 amihcaan cacay a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku tulu a demiad, Hungaty amala u tatenglan nu binawlan a kanatal. laylayś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 895ŚĻīšĻčŚČćayaw nu 895 a mihcaan ayaw nu kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan, Luoma a tademal mapenec tu ku tizaay a Yin-cu-min ci Dacia a tademaw patizeng satu tu Pannonia a kenis. 395 a mihcaan, Luoma diguo mangeli' hawsa, paybinacadan lalid satu mabulaw tayni. kasumamadan tu 5 a mihcaan tu teban, Hungary a tademaw i A-ti-la i "434-453" a mihcaan, ku nikelid patizeng tuway tu Hungary Hungti a kanatal. 453 a mihcaan mapatay tu ci A-ti-la hawsa, malawpes tu ku Hungary. katuud ku nu Rierman a niyazu' mahiniay u Gepids a tademaw, Gede a tademaw ,Wang daer a tademaw, Lunba-di a tademaw kakilukilu sa mikuwan tu itiniay pakala tu cacay a lasubu a mihcaan. Hungary a tademaw ci Gepidae a tademaw ayaw itini patizang tu Gepidae a Hungti a kanatal, zikuzan satu kasaniyazu' nu Slav a niyazu' malingatu tu micumud mueneng itini. 560 a mihcaan Avar a tademaw patizeng tu Avar-han a kanatal atu itini a kakitizaan mikawaw mialaw mikuwan katukuh i 200 a mihcaan katenens. 790 a mihcaan, Avar-han a kanatal malawpes nu Frankish- Kinngdom atu Chali-dadi, kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan, cay ku tungusay nu Frank a tademawan tu ci Silaf a tademaw i Duo-nao-xian-an patizeng tu Palaton a kanatal, i Baojialiya u saayaway a Hungti a kanatal maala tu nu Duonaohea a nuwalian a tukus mikuwan tu itizaaytu a Silaf a niyazu' atu liwanliwan tu nu Avar a tademaw.šł≠šłĖÁīÄ teban nu kasumamadan a mihcaan(895ŚĻīŤá≥1526ŚĻī) Hungary a kanatal mala u lalekal nu kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan hawsa, sawaliayan u pahabayay tu aadupan a binacadan Magyar a tademaw namakay Ula-san-silu atu Voga-River a sauwacan, nu yazaay a Basgort-tele, pasayza i satipan mabulaw, i 896 a mihcaan i Donau a masahelungay a kakitizaan mueneng. katayni nu Magyar a tademaw pahezek tu ku nikacaculi nu itiniay a kakitizaan. laylay nu babalaki, Magyar a tademaw kanatal asaan nau Aer-pa-de a kanatal ku patizegay a saan, ciniza i kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan tu sazikuzay a mihcaan mikelad tu Magyar a tademawan tayza i enal nu Pannonia.1000ŚĻī, 1000 a mihcaan Hungary a Hungti ci Istvan Urbanyi cacay a lasubu a mihcaan i Hungary palekal tu kelistukiw mala ku-cyaw, satu pakala tu nu kiwkay a nipacakat mala u saayaway a Hungti nu Hungary , patizeng satu Hungary a Hungti a kanatal. kasumamadan u laylay malecad tu Bolan atu Bohemian makakayat tu, namahiza namapalilid nu ciwlu atu u kasenengan a Roman Empire a Hungti. 1241 a mihcaan katukuh i 1242 a mihcaan, ci Ba-du satipan micumud mingawaw, Hungary namapihaceng ku nikapeci'. satu Hungary haymaw satu macakat mala nu Europe u saicelangay misatekeday hungti a kanatal. izaw ku salungayay masacidekay a lalangawan, mahiza u nu Xiou nuzuma a macakata a nikauzip macacayat tu. Hunyadi Matyas i 1458 a mihcaan katukuh 1490 a mihcaan mikuwan tu Hungar talaayaw satu ciniza pasaicelang tu Hungary atu cin-bu a icelang. i pikuwan niza hawsa, Hungary " uyzaan saca u nuwamisanay, ayzaay a Slovakia nu zumaay a kakitizaan" mala u palekalan tu lalangawan nalimaan a mihcaan, Ouzhou a kasaupuan kapulungay tu nalimaan lalangawan. cin-Á∂ďśŅü uyniay a kanatal caay kadadah ku nu tahakay a laculan, u tapang u ku'ng-can u Lu-tu, pisuped a kayadah sakatul i Europe. mamin i kanatal 2/3 a kakitizaan izaw ku akutiay a lalaculan. u kalukan ku tapang a kahenulan. tapang nipalumaan izaw ku habay, kubkub, malinsu, atu sicedamay a lami'. u kung-ye u kikay ku misangaay, nu keciay a kikay, misabaluhay tu kakanan atu mitenunay ku tapang, misaepah tu badisusu' kya singangan.namakay 2004 a mihcaan lima a bulad cacay a demiad mala baluhay a tademaw nu Oumenng, Hungary a cin-ci lalid sa icelang macakat. imahini izaw ku nu uzipay a kusi patahkal paanina uynian a kanatal payhun 80% katalakaw tu GDP. 2007 a mihcaan hawsa, mahamin ku kitakitay malilid tu kapelpel nu cin-ci, Hungary kalamkam satu malawacu ku cinci. ducduc tu pulung nisulitan, Hungary i kitakit u sapihacengay kalihanawan a cinci nu kanatal. maydih a malaheci' tahkal i 2020 a mihcaan sibalucu' micumud tu Ouzhou a kalisiwan, uynian a kanatal maydih a talaayaw ku cin-ci pasumad.

tu par~…ĺaton a kanatar~…ĺ, i baojiar~…ĺija u saajawaj a ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ maar~…ĺa tu nu duonaońß…ôa a nuwar~…ĺian a tukus mikuwan tu itizaajtu a sir~…ĺaf a nijazu Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺiwanr~…ĺiwan tu nu a*ar a tad…ômaw.*** t…ôban nu kasumamadan a mińß ¶aan(**********) ńßuŇčarj a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ nu kasumamadan tu * a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, sawar~…ĺiajan u pańßabajaj tu aadupan a bina ¶adan magjar a tad…ômaw namakaj ur~…ĺa-san-sir~…ĺu atu *oga-*i*…ôr a sauwa ¶an, nu jazaaj a basgort-t…ôr~…ĺ…ô, pasajza i satipan mabur~…ĺaw, i *** a mińß ¶aan i donau a masańß…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj a kakitizaan mu…ôn…ôŇč. katajni nu magjar a tad…ômaw pańß…ôz…ôk tu ku nika ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi nu itiniaj a kakitizaan. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu babar~…ĺaki, magjar a tad…ômaw kanatar~…ĺ asaan nau a…ôr-pa-d…ô a kanatar~…ĺ ku patiz…ôgaj a saan, ¶iniza i kasumamadan tu * a mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan mik…ôr~…ĺad tu magjar a tad…ômawan tajza i …ônar~…ĺ nu pannonia.*****, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßuŇčarj a ńßuŇčti ¶i ist*an urbanji ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan i ńßuŇčarj par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu k…ôr~…ĺistukiw mar~…ĺa ku- ¶jaw, satu pakar~…ĺa tu nu kiwkaj a nipa ¶akat mar~…ĺa u saajawaj a ńßuŇčti nu ńßuŇčarj , patiz…ôŇč satu ńßuŇčarj a ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ. kasumamadan u r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu bor~…ĺan atu bońß…ômian makakajat tu, namańßiza namapar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu ¶iwr~…ĺu atu u kas…ôn…ôŇčan a *oman …ômpir…ô a ńßuŇčti. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ba-du satipan mi ¶umud miŇčawaw, ńßuŇčarj namapińßa ¶…ôŇč ku nikap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. satu ńßuŇčarj ńßajmaw satu ma ¶akat mar~…ĺa nu …ôurop…ô u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj misat…ôk…ôdaj ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ. izaw ku sar~…ĺuŇčajaj masa ¶id…ôkaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mańßiza u nu *iou nuzuma a ma ¶akata a nikauzip ma ¶a ¶ajat tu. ńßunjadi matjas i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan mikuwan tu ńßuŇčar tar~…ĺaajaw satu ¶iniza pasai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu ńßuŇčarj atu ¶in-bu a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. i pikuwan niza ńßawsa, ńßuŇčarj " ujzaan sa ¶a u nuwamisanaj, ajzaaj a sr~…ĺo*akia nu zumaaj a kakitizaan" mar~…ĺa u par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nar~…ĺimaan a mińß ¶aan, ouzńßou a kasaupuan kapur~…ĺuŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ¶in-** ujniaj a kanatar~…ĺ ¶aaj kadadańß ku nu tańßakaj a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, u tapaŇč u ku Ē~ °Ňč- ¶an u r~…ĺu-tu, pisup…ôd a kajadańß sakatur~…ĺ i …ôurop…ô. mamin i kanatar~…ĺ */* a kakitizaan izaw ku akutiaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. u kar~…ĺukan ku tapaŇč a kańß…ônur~…ĺan. tapaŇč nipar~…ĺumaan izaw ku ńßabaj, kubkub, mar~…ĺinsu, atu si ¶…ôdamaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °. u kuŇč-j…ô u kikaj ku misaŇčaaj, nu k…ô ¶iaj a kikaj, misabar~…ĺuńßaj tu kakanan atu mit…ônunaj ku tapaŇč, misa…ôpańß tu badisusu Ē~ ° kja siŇčaŇčan.namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺuńßaj a tad…ômaw nu oum…ônŇč, ńßuŇčarj a ¶in- ¶i r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ma ¶akat. imańßini izaw ku nu uzipaj a kusi patańßkar~…ĺ paanina ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ pajńßun **% katar~…ĺakaw tu gdp. **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, mańßamin ku kitakitaj mar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu kap…ôr~…ĺp…ôr~…ĺ nu ¶in- ¶i, ńßuŇčarj kar~…ĺamkam satu mar~…ĺawa ¶u ku ¶in ¶i. du ¶du ¶ tu pur~…ĺuŇč nisur~…ĺitan, ńßuŇčarj i kitakit u sapińßa ¶…ôŇčaj kar~…ĺińßanawan a ¶in ¶i nu kanatar~…ĺ. majdińß a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tańßkar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mi ¶umud tu ouzńßou a kar~…ĺisiwan, ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ majdińß a tar~…ĺaajaw ku ¶in- ¶i pasumad.
S.FORM: u Hungary sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 47 00 N, 20 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 93,028 km2 u ahebal nu lalaay sa 89,608 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 3,420 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 9,874,784. kakalukan umah sa 58.90%, kilakilangan umah sa 22.50%, zumaay henay umah sa 18.60% caay kamu cabaya a kanatla nu Taywan. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Budapest . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 20 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci J√°nos √Āder, micakat a demiad sa i 2012 a mihca 5 bulad 10 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Hungary ayza sa ci Viktor Orb√°n, micakat a demiad sa i 2010 a mihcaan 5 bulad 29 demiad. Hungary Hungary Hungary a kamu "Magyarorsza'g" han u i Cung-ow Pannonia masaenal ku lalabu nu kanatal, 93030 kungli kaahebal, nuwaminsa a belaw u Slovakia, nuwalia amis a belaw u Ukraine, nuwalian atu nuwalian timul balaw u Romania, nutimulan a belaw u Serbia, satipan timul belaw Croatia, satipan belaw Slovenia, satipan nuwamisan a belaw u Austria. kanatal a kamu Magyarok han, nu Ouzhou ku kamu. caay ku nu Yindu Ouzhou a kamu. u Oumeng tatudungay a ahebal nu kanatal. kahenunal a tu-se atu satabakiay a tu-se u Budapest, nu zumaay a tabakiay tu-se zuma satu u Debrecen, Szeged, Miskolc, Bei-chi, Jiaoer. ayzaay a Hungary a kanatal i ayaw tu malebut a mihcaan namakuwan nu pinaay a binacadan, pasu Dacia a tademaw, Celtic (Kai-er-te a tademaw ŚáĪÁąĺÁČĻšļļ), Roman (Romae ÁĺÖť¶¨) a tademaw, Germanic (Rierman a tademaw śó•ŤÄ≥śõľšļļ), Hungary a tademaw , nutipan a slavs a tademaw , atu Avaria a tademawan . kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan , Magyar a tademaw ci Alpad (Aer-pa-de ťėŅÁąĺŚłēŚĺ∑) a tapang ku mikeliday mademec ku Karpat-medence, u baki a wawaan niza ci Isn-te'-wan cacay a lasubua a mihcaan i cacay a malebut a mihcaan malahungti, patizeng satu tu ciwlu a kiwkay. kasumamadan tu 12 a mihcaan, Hungary mala Ouzhou a kakitizaan u saicelangay a misakakuay. kasumamadan tu15 a mihcaan, u lalangawan atu cen-ce katukuh tu i satalakaway. 1526 a mihcaan u saayaway nu Mohachi (Mo-ha-chi śĎ©ŚďąŤĶ§) a ngangayaw hawsa Hungary makelec nu Ottoman (E-tu-man ťĄāŚúĖśõľ) "1541-1699 a mihcaan". kasumamadan tu18 a mihcaan malingatu makuwan nu Habsburg Monarchy. 19 a mihcaan atu Austria masakapu tu Austria Hungary a kanatal, mala u saicelangay mikuwan nu Europe. saayaway a ngangayaw nu kitakit hawsa, Austro-Hungarian (Ao-Hungary Ś•ßŚĆą) a kanatal maliwasak tu, namasasulit tu Trianon (Te-li-ya-nung ÁČĻťáĆšļěŤĺ≤) a katatelekan hawsa Hungary malasawad tu ku payhun 71% a lala' atu payhun 58% ku tademaw, atu payhun 32% ku tademaw nu Mazar. zikuzan tu kalawlawan a mihcaan, Hungary micumud tu nitungusay i balucu'ay u kanatal milihiza tu sakatusa a ngangayaw nu kitakit, satu pihaceng ku madukaay mapatayay. zikuzan nu sakatusa a ngangayaw, Hungary mala nu Sulian a uysin a kanatal katukuh i 1989 a mihcaan. i 1956 a mihcaan u Hungary mikawaw tu misapakutay caay kalaheci hawsa, Hungary pasumad tu Goulash (Ku-las-sen ŚŹ§śčČšĽÄ) kung-can a nizatengan. 1989 a mihcaan atu Austria masasu patahkal tu lilis nu kanatal kalamkam satu maliwasak ku nuwalianay a sakaput atu Sulian. 1989 amihcaan caca a bataan tusa bataan izaw ku tulu a demiad, Hungaty amala u I'-huy-min-cu a kanatal. . saayaway a ngangayaw nu kitakit hawsa, Austro-Hungarian (Ao-Hungary Ś•ßŚĆą) a kanatal maliwasak tu, namasasulit tu Trianon (Te-li-ya-nung ÁČĻťáĆšļěŤĺ≤) a katatelekan hawsa Hungary malasawad tu ku payhun 71% a lala' atu payhun 58% ku tademaw, atu payhun32% ku tademaw nu Mazar. zikuzan tu kalawlawan a mihcaan, Hungary micumud tu nisakapu milihiza tu sakatusa nu kitakit a ngangangan, satu pihaceng ku madukaay mapatayay. zikuzan nu sakatusa a ngangayaw, Hungary mala nu Sulian a uysin a kanatal katukuh i 1989 a mihcaan. i 1956 a mihcaan u Hungary ke-min mademec hawsa, Hungary pasumad tu nu Ku-las-sen kung-can a nisabalucu'an. 1989 a mihcaan atu Austria masasu patahkal tu lilis nu kanatal kalamkam satu maliwasak ku nuwalianay a sakaput atu Sulian. 1989 amihcaan cacay a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku tulu a demiad, Hungaty amala u tatenglan nu binawlan a kanatal. laylayś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 895ŚĻīšĻčŚČćayaw nu 895 a mihcaan ayaw nu kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan, Luoma a tademal mapenec tu ku tizaay a Yin-cu-min ci Dacia a tademaw patizeng satu tu Pannonia a kenis. 395 a mihcaan, Luoma diguo mangeli' hawsa, paybinacadan lalid satu mabulaw tayni. kasumamadan tu 5 a mihcaan tu teban, Hungary a tademaw i A-ti-la i "434-453" a mihcaan, ku nikelid patizeng tuway tu Hungary Hungti a kanatal. 453 a mihcaan mapatay tu ci A-ti-la hawsa, malawpes tu ku Hungary. katuud ku nu Rierman a niyazu' mahiniay u Gepids a tademaw, Gede a tademaw ,Wang daer a tademaw, Lunba-di a tademaw kakilukilu sa mikuwan tu itiniay pakala tu cacay a lasubu a mihcaan. Hungary a tademaw ci Gepidae a tademaw ayaw itini patizang tu Gepidae a Hungti a kanatal, zikuzan satu kasaniyazu' nu Slav a niyazu' malingatu tu micumud mueneng itini. 560 a mihcaan Avar a tademaw patizeng tu Avar-han a kanatal atu itini a kakitizaan mikawaw mialaw mikuwan katukuh i 200 a mihcaan katenens. 790 a mihcaan, Avar-han a kanatal malawpes nu Frankish- Kinngdom atu Chali-dadi, kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan, cay ku tungusay nu Frank a tademawan tu ci Silaf a tademaw i Duo-nao-xian-an patizeng tu Palaton a kanatal, i Baojialiya u saayaway a Hungti a kanatal maala tu nu Duonaohea a nuwalian a tukus mikuwan tu itizaaytu a Silaf a niyazu' atu liwanliwan tu nu Avar a tademaw.šł≠šłĖÁīÄ teban nu kasumamadan a mihcaan(895ŚĻīŤá≥1526ŚĻī) Hungary a kanatal mala u lalekal nu kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan hawsa, sawaliayan u pahabayay tu aadupan a binacadan Magyar a tademaw namakay Ula-san-silu atu Voga-River a sauwacan, nu yazaay a Basgort-tele, pasayza i satipan mabulaw, i 896 a mihcaan i Donau a masahelungay a kakitizaan mueneng. katayni nu Magyar a tademaw pahezek tu ku nikacaculi nu itiniay a kakitizaan. laylay nu babalaki, Magyar a tademaw kanatal asaan nau Aer-pa-de a kanatal ku patizegay a saan, ciniza i kasumamadan tu 9 a mihcaan tu sazikuzay a mihcaan mikelad tu Magyar a tademawan tayza i enal nu Pannonia.1000ŚĻī, 1000 a mihcaan Hungary a Hungti ci Istvan Urbanyi cacay a lasubu a mihcaan i Hungary palekal tu kelistukiw mala ku-cyaw, satu pakala tu nu kiwkay a nipacakat mala u saayaway a Hungti nu Hungary , patizeng satu Hungary a Hungti a kanatal. kasumamadan u laylay malecad tu Bolan atu Bohemian makakayat tu, namahiza namapalilid nu ciwlu atu u kasenengan a Roman Empire a Hungti. 1241 a mihcaan katukuh i 1242 a mihcaan, ci Ba-du satipan micumud mingawaw, Hungary namapihaceng ku nikapeci'. satu Hungary haymaw satu macakat mala nu Europe u saicelangay misatekeday hungti a kanatal. izaw ku salungayay masacidekay a lalangawan, mahiza u nu Xiou nuzuma a macakata a nikauzip macacayat tu. Hunyadi Matyas i 1458 a mihcaan katukuh 1490 a mihcaan mikuwan tu Hungar talaayaw satu ciniza pasaicelang tu Hungary atu cin-bu a icelang. i pikuwan niza hawsa, Hungary " uyzaan saca u nuwamisanay, ayzaay a Slovakia nu zumaay a kakitizaan" mala u palekalan tu lalangawan nalimaan a mihcaan, Ouzhou a kasaupuan kapulungay tu nalimaan lalangawan. cin-Á∂ďśŅü uyniay a kanatal caay kadadah ku nu tahakay a laculan, u tapang u ku'ng-can u Lu-tu, pisuped a kayadah sakatul i Europe. mamin i kanatal 2/3 a kakitizaan izaw ku akutiay a lalaculan. u kalukan ku tapang a kahenulan. tapang nipalumaan izaw ku habay, kubkub, malinsu, atu sicedamay a lami'. u kung-ye u kikay ku misangaay, nu keciay a kikay, misabaluhay tu kakanan atu mitenunay ku tapang, misaepah tu badisusu' kya singangan.namakay 2004 a mihcaan lima a bulad cacay a demiad mala baluhay a tademaw nu Oumenng, Hungary a cin-ci lalid sa icelang macakat. imahini izaw ku nu uzipay a kusi patahkal paanina uynian a kanatal payhun 80% katalakaw tu GDP. 2007 a mihcaan hawsa, mahamin ku kitakitay malilid tu kapelpel nu cin-ci, Hungary kalamkam satu malawacu ku cinci. ducduc tu pulung nisulitan, Hungary i kitakit u sapihacengay kalihanawan a cinci nu kanatal. maydih a malaheci' tahkal i 2020 a mihcaan sibalucu' micumud tu Ouzhou a kalisiwan, uynian a kanatal maydih a talaayaw ku cin-ci pasumad.

**** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ba-du satipan mi ¶umud miŇčawaw, ńßuŇčarj namapińßa ¶…ôŇč ku nikap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. satu ńßuŇčarj ńßajmaw satu ma ¶akat mar~…ĺa nu …ôurop…ô u sai
